# BELGIE - BELGIQUE - BELGIEN

> Eendracht maakt macht. L’union fait la force. Einigkeit macht stark.

## Canonical

- [Homepage](https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/): The canonical public page.

## Language States

- [Dutch](https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/?lang=nl): Opens the site with Dutch selected.
- [French](https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/?lang=fr): Opens the site with French selected.
- [German](https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/?lang=de): Opens the site with German selected.
- [Dutch lyrics](https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/?lyrics=1&lang=nl): Opens the lyrics overlay in Dutch.
- [French lyrics](https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/?lyrics=1&lang=fr): Opens the lyrics overlay in French.
- [German lyrics](https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/?lyrics=1&lang=de): Opens the lyrics overlay in German.

## Crawling Notes

- Canonical URL: https://www.wallonie.vlaanderen/
- Language query URLs are shareable UI states, not separate canonical pages.
- Public AI assistants and search crawlers may reference this page.
